chunks.text: Apple NSI Fellowship and Scholarship Recipients - EECS at Berkeley Apple NSI Fellowship and Scholarship Recipients Apple NSI Fellowship and Scholarship Recipients Many congratulations to the scholarship and fellowship winners below! These top students were evaluated against several criteria, including expressed interest in courses, research, and/or internships in the areas of IC Engineering, SoC design, Verification, Test, RF, Analog, Mixed Signal Circuit, and Computer Architecture. Berkeley and Apple are both interested in working towards achieving the benefits of a broadly diverse student scholarship group. Academic Year 2025/2026 Joshua You 5th-Year M.S.
